properties.name: Andøya Airport, Andenes
properties.rule: No drone flights within 5 km without permission from the air traffic service (Luftfartstilsynet rule). Larger airports here also have a control zone (CTR) — see that layer.

properties.name: Bodø Airport

properties.name: Engeløy Airfield
properties.rule: Uncontrolled airfield — no scheduled air traffic service. The 5 km airport rule may not formally apply here, but keep well clear of any local flight activity.
